claims.subject: ceftazidime resistance
claims.evidence_span: resistance to one compound results in increased sensitivity to another

claims.subject: borrelidin A
claims.evidence_span: borrelidin A prevented the evolution of clinical ceftazidime resistance

claims.subject: ceftazidime-borrelidin A co-dosing
claims.evidence_span: co-dosed strains had reduced resistance and cross-resistance to all tested antibiotics

claims.subject: mobile-element insertion mutations
claims.evidence_span: resulted in an increased number of mobile-element insertion mutations

claims.subject: novel mutation
claims.evidence_span: a possible novel borrelidin A resistance mutation
